climate.description: Mild Nordic summer with long daylight hours; variable weather typical of Jutland peninsula.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 77. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 74.

course_description.character: Historic point-to-point road epic tracing the ancient Hærvejen ridge through Jutland's ice-age formed hills, blending cultural landmarks with relentless rolling terrain.
course_description.signature_challenge: Crossing the German-Danish border early, then battling cumulative elevation and wind-swept ridges to the triumphant red carpet finish in Viborg.
suffering_zones: Mur de Refsgårde: Mid-race 550m wall at 8.2% average gradient that shatters rhythm after hours of pedaling.
Jennumbakken: Longest climb at 1175m and 5.6% gradient, a grinding test of endurance amid scenic Viking landscapes.
Jutland Rollercoaster: Constant succession of short, steep hills formed by ancient glaciers, wearing down legs over 186 miles.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Viborg offers hotels, hostels, and barracks-area camping; book early for June event. Flensburg pre-race stays near start.
logistics.transport: Mass-participation gran fondo with 15 routes converging on Viborg's Paradepladsen; road, MTB, and gravel options. Queen stage starts Flensburg with chip timing before finish-line parade.

history.origin_story: Denmark's largest cycling event, inspired by ancient Hærvejen migration route used by Vikings, pilgrims, and armies. Now part of prestigious L'Etape Denmark by Tour de France series.

final_verdict.one_liner: Viking-fueled endurance test blending history, hills, and high-quality organization.

citations.label: Events 2024: Cyclosportives with 300 and more Kilometers
